# Walter A. Jablonowski - AI Developer & AI Consultant

> Freelance AI developer and consultant based in Stegaurach near Bamberg,
> serving businesses in Bamberg, Nuremberg and the wider Franconia/Bavaria
> region (and remotely). 25+ years in software development, with a focus on
> AI integration, AI agents, automation, web and database development.

This site is a static, bilingual (German / English) profile and business site.
The German version is the default; English lives under `/en/`. There is no
tracking and no analytics. A built-in voice agent (Google Gemini Live) lets
visitors talk to an AI about these services directly on the home page.

- Home (German, default): https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/
- Home (English): https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/
- Contact: walter.a.jablonowski@gmail.com · +49 160 99658047

## Services

- [AI Automation](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/automation.html): Automate recurring work with AI agents or workflows, integrated with existing systems (CRM/ERP). Saves time and resources every year.
- [Self-improving AI](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/self-improving.html): The company as a closed loop that gets better with every run — more than automation. Kept safe through an append-only log and human approval.
- [AI Data Solutions](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/data-solutions.html): Structure unordered company data with AI, make it searchable, and query it in natural language — the basis for automation and new insights.
- [AI Consulting](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/consulting.html): Vendor-neutral clarification of where AI delivers real value — use cases, strategy, technology. Free initial consultation.
- [AI Security & Evaluation](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/security.html): Secure AI systems and make them observable and verifiable — guardrails, monitoring, quality measurement, GDPR.
- [AI Dashboards](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/services/dashboards.html): Everything you care about in one place — modular dashboards for the whole company, departments or individual employees, fed with live data from existing systems (databases, ERP/CRM, spreadsheets, APIs). Built-in AI (sidebar or voice) prepares data on request or triggers actions.

## Systems

Ready-to-adapt products built from these services.

- [Website AI Agent](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/systems/web_agent/): An AI voice assistant embedded on your website — visitors talk to it, it answers in real time, guides them to the right page, and is multilingual. API key and context stay server-side.
- [Chat with Data](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/systems/data_chat/): Ask your company data questions in natural language — the AI builds a safe, read-only query and returns tables, summaries and charts. Runs on your server or fully local. A tailor-made AI data solution.
- [SEO Agent](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/systems/seo_agent/): A scheduled AI agent that audits your website and optimizes it for Google and AI search (GEO) — meta tags, content, structured data, new pages. Runs on its own or alongside the other systems.
- [AI Log Viewer](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/systems/log-view/): A universal log viewer that brings log files of any format into one place — with a powerful expression filter syntax, AI analysis and a pluggable type system. SQLite with zero setup or MySQL for logs with 100,000+ entries.
- [Agent DB](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/systems/agentic_db/): A file-based Markdown knowledge base that an AI KeeperAgent organizes on its own — places, splits, merges, indexes and archives. Atomic, versioned, fully undoable. Works standalone as plain files too.

## Regions

Location landing pages for AI services in Franconia/Bavaria (on-site or remote).

- [KI Firma Nürnberg (German)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/pages/regionen/ki-firma-nuernberg.html) / [AI Company Nuremberg (English)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/regionen/ai-company-nuremberg.html): AI consulting, development and automation for businesses in Nuremberg, Fürth, Erlangen and Middle Franconia.
- [KI Firma Bamberg (German)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/pages/regionen/ki-firma-bamberg.html) / [AI Company Bamberg (English)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/regionen/ai-company-bamberg.html): AI consulting, development and automation for businesses in Bamberg and Upper Franconia.
- [Regions overview (German)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/pages/regionen/) / [Regions overview (English)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/regionen/): Hub for all regional AI landing pages.

## About

- [About / profile (English)](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/#about): Background, skills and experience. Core areas: AI integration, AI agents, AI automation, machine learning, LLMs, web development, database design, SQL, PHP, Python, TypeScript.
- [Contact form](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/#contact): Reach out about a project or a free initial consultation.

## Optional

- [Projects](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/#proj): Selected projects and demos.
- [Blog](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/blog.html): Articles on AI-first development and local AI.
  - [Local AI for the Mittelstand in Bamberg and Nuremberg](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/blog/260708-01-lokale-ki-mittelstand-on-premise.html): Why on-premise open-weights LLMs (Llama 3, Mistral, Qwen) fit privacy-conscious SMEs in Upper Franconia — GDPR-compliant, no data leaving the building.
  - [Autonomous agents with Google ADK, Coinbase x402, and AP2](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/blog/250918-01-autonomous-agents-ap2-x402.html): The emerging agent stack — build with Google's Agent Dev Kit, distribute via x402 Bazaar, monetize with AP2.
  - [AI-first development boosts productivity](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/pages/blog/250918-02-ai-first-development-boosts-productivity.html): How to leverage AI across the lifecycle of small to mid-size apps — from ideation to code generation and quality assurance.
- [Privacy Policy](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/privacy.html)
- [Imprint](https://walter-a-jablonowski.github.io/en/imprint.html)
